name: export and import selected notes from enex file

steps.name: Settings page heading should be visible after opening settings from the sidebar footer getByRole('heading', { name: 'Settings', level: 1 })
Opening settings from the sidebar footer should navigate to the dedicated /settings route
Accessibility scan on "Settings Page" should have no violations
Settings page should show the export tab heading after selecting export locator('section h2').first()
Export tab should expose the primary export action button locator('button:visible').filter({ hasText: /^Export \.enex file$/ })
Export notes dialog should be visible after opening export flow getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' })
Export notes dialog title should be visible getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByRole('heading', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' })
Export notes dialog should expose the notes search field on the new settings flow getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Search by title or text' })
Select all button should be enabled after loading notes getByRole('button', { name: 'Select all' })
Accessibility scan on "Export Notes Dialog" should have no violations
Check getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Select note Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-1' })

Note checkbox for "Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-1" should be checked before export getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Select note Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-1' })

Check getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Select note Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-3' })

Note checkbox for "Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-3" should be checked before export getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'Select note Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-3' })
Selected counter should reflect the number of notes picked for export getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByText(/Selected: \d+ of \d+/)
Click getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export notes to .enex' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Export' })
Download should complete successfully without browser-reported failure
Export completed dialog should appear after export finishes getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export completed' })
Export completed dialog title should be visible getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export completed' }).getByRole('heading', { name: 'Export completed' })
Export completed dialog should show ready message getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export completed' }).getByText('File is ready to download.')

steps.name: save export download and close dialog
Exported ENEX file should exist on disk after saving download
Export completed dialog should be hidden after closing it getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Export completed' })
Closing the export completion dialog should keep the user on the settings route
API should delete original note with ID 568cd843-2a24-4c9c-ad34-8b23cfdfb6a9 before import
API should delete original note with ID 7556520b-31cf-4c24-a7f6-2de36ba52166 before import
API should delete original note with ID 8c8a75e8-3619-4c4d-901d-93c8475796f4 before import
Back button on the settings page should return the user to the notes workspace
Original note "Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-1" should be deleted before import. getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-1' }).first()
Original note "Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-2" should be deleted before import. getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Export note 1784044718136-8db7b2-2' }).first()

Reopening settings for import should navigate back to the settings route
Settings page should show the import tab heading after selecting import locator('section h2').first()
Import tab should expose the primary import action button locator('button:visible').filter({ hasText: /^Import \.enex file$/ })
Accessibility scan on "Import Tab" should have no violations
Import notes dialog should be visible after opening import flow getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import ENEX file' })
Import notes dialog title should be visible getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import ENEX file' }).getByRole('heading', { name: 'Import ENEX file' })
Accessibility scan on "Import Notes Dialog" should have no violations
"Skip duplicate notes" option should be selected before import getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import ENEX file' }).locator('button[role="radio"]#skip')
Set input files getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import ENEX file' }).locator('input[type="file"]')
Import button should become enabled after selecting a valid ENEX file getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import ENEX file' }).getByRole('button', { name: /^Import(?: \(\d+\))?$/ })
Click getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import ENEX file' }).getByRole('button', { name: /^Import(?: \(\d+\))?$/ })
Import notes dialog should close after starting import getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import ENEX file' })
Import completed dialog should be visible after import finishes getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import Complete' })
Import completed dialog title should be visible getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import Complete' }).getByRole('heading', { name: 'Import Complete' })
Import completed dialog should show ready message getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import Complete' }).getByText('Your import has finished.')
Accessibility scan on "Import Completed Dialog" should have no violations
Import completed dialog should report the expected number of imported notes getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import Complete' }).getByText('Successfully imported')
Import completed dialog should be hidden after closing it getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Import Complete' })
Closing the import completion dialog should keep the user on the settings route until the user exits it

verify imported notes in general list
Back button should return from settings to the notes workspace after import
